race.comment: SCANDALIZE (8) was luckless two back then put it all together in dominant style here last start, scoring with plenty up his sleeve. He can go right on with it now. THE SHAPER (1) made light work of his rivals at Wagga and was strong through the line, suggesting he'll relish the mile. Draws well and should be right there when they sprint. TROPICAL HOUSE (15) is a promising type resuming for the Stephens camp. She was in great touch last prep and her best figures stack up. Two trials have her ready and the draw is kind. Take seriously. BRAVE STAR (10) was only warming late second up over 1250m. He gets to a more suitable trip third up and should be more proactive. Not to be underestimated. PHINEAS (14) will need luck from the carpark draw but he's strong at the mile. With even breaks he can make his presence felt.
